FOLDER.NAME: cbFC
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Folder contains objects from the cbFC project

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period
Email Text
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
Review cbFC workflows in Workflow monitor
Repository: %d Folder: %n Workflow: %w Session: %s %b %c Status: %e %l %r

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT CBDW.DW_BATCH_CONTROL.BATCH_ID as BATCH_ID, RTRIM(CBDW.DW_BATCH_CONTROL.BATCH_STS) as BATCH_STS FROM CBDW.DW_BATCH_CONTROL WHERE TYPE = 'DW'

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Fail task if any command fails

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_AUDIT_SRC_0FI_AP_4_FILES.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_AUDIT_SRC_0FI_AP_4_FILES.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_AUDIT_SRC_0FI_AP_4_FILES.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_FACT_AP_LNITM.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_FACT_AP_LNITM.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_FACT_AP_LNITM.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_FACT_AP_LNITM_STG.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_FACT_AP_LNITM_STG.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_FACT_AP_LNITM_STG.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $CP_FILE_ARCHIVE_RM_SRCFILE.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $CP_FILE_ARCHIVE_RM_SRCFILE.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $CP_FILE_ARCHIVE_RM_SRCFILE.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub
